product: ADOS Mission Control V2 (The Black Agency Command Deck)

inScope: Phase 1 read-only brokered cockpit (nine questions + module surfaces)
Phase 2 approve/reject/withdraw via allowlisted ADOS tools
Phase 2 owner-gate challenge → external Ed25519 sign → decide
Fail-closed without pinned owner public key
Default GET-only when MISSION_CONTROL_PHASE2_COMMANDS is not enabled
outOfScope: Phase 3 controlled dispatch / worker launch (NOT AUTHORIZED)
Holding owner private keys in the Mission Control repo or image

qualityGates.phase2Unit: 5/5 pass (middleware gate, approval disposition, signed gate decide, pubkey fail-closed)

successCriteriaMet: Owner can observe lease/approvals/blockers/readiness without raw JSON
Unsafe methods still READ_ONLY_V2 unless Phase 2 flag enabled
Phase 2 dispositions and gate decisions append via scripts/ados-tools only
Agents cannot self-approve owner gates; signatures verified against pinned pubkey

autonomousLoop.nextRecommendation: MVP reached for Phase 1+2. Do not implement Phase 3 dispatch without a new owner authorization package.
